redshift.clustersecuritygroupingress.CID.Description: The IP range to be added the Amazon Redshift security group.

redshift.clustersecuritygroupingress.Clu.Description: The name of the security group to which the ingress rule is added.

redshift.clustersecuritygroupingress.EC2.Description: The EC2 security group to be added the Amazon Redshift security group.

The AWS account number of the owner of the security group specified by the *EC2SecurityGroupName* parameter. The AWS Access Key ID is not an acceptable value.   Example: `111122223333`   Conditional. If you specify the `EC2SecurityGroupName` property, you must specify this property.
